rawIntent: Scaffold the project foundation for a TypeScript application: create package.json (name: trackeros, version: 0.1.0, private: true, packageManager: pnpm@9.15.4) with scripts for build (tsc), test (vitest run), and dev (tsx src/index.ts). Add TypeScript 5.x, Vitest, and tsx as dev dependencies. Create tsconfig.json with strict mode targeting ES2022 with Node module resolution. Create src/index.ts with a simple hello world export. Create a basic Vitest test at src/index.test.ts that imports and verifies the export.

successCriteria.description: The project is scaffolded with the specified package.json, tsconfig.json, src/index.ts, and src/index.test.ts files.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record.
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline.
Input validated at the API boundary.
outOfScope: Implementation of business logic beyond the scaffolded files.
